title: schrebera swietenioides var. pubescens
intro: Schrebera swietenioides var. pubescens, also known as the hairy Schrebera, is a plant species within the family Oleaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Schrebera swietenioides var. pubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
